scripts.test:realtime: tsc -p tsconfig.realtime-test.json && node --test test/realtime-client.test.mjs test/scanner-realtime.test.mjs test/watchlist-realtime.test.mjs test/market-realtime.test.mjs test/alerts-realtime.test.mjs test/workspace-realtime.test.mjs test/dashboard-realtime.test.mjs test/dashboard-scanner-metrics.test.mjs test/scanner-filters-sorting.test.mjs test/binance-symbol-universe.test.mjs test/dashboard-scanner-universe.test.mjs test/market-wide-scanner-metrics.test.mjs test/market-volume-spikes.test.mjs
scripts.check: npm run verify:foundation && npm run verify:realtime && npm run verify:scanner-realtime && npm run verify:watchlist-realtime && npm run verify:market-realtime && npm run verify:alerts-realtime && npm run verify:workspace-realtime && npm run verify:dashboard-realtime && npm run verify:dashboard-scanner-metrics && npm run verify:trading-presets && npm run verify:scanner-filters-sorting && npm run verify:binance-symbol-universe && npm run verify:market-volume-spikes-ui && npm run typecheck && npm run test:realtime
